allow: PowerShell(dir "D:\\my playright project\\" -Force | where {$_.Name -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.claude|\\.github|playwright-report|test-results|projects|screenshots'} | select Name)
PowerShell(dir "D:\\my playright project\\tests\\" -Recurse | where {!$_.PSIsContainer} | select FullName)
PowerShell(Write-Host "=== PLAYWRIGHT PROJECT ===" ; Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\my playright project\\tests\\intranet\\" -Recurse -Force | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\my playright project\\tests\\intranet" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -eq '.ts' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object)

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; if \(-not \(Test-Path tsconfig.json\)\) { npx tsc --noEmit "tests/intranet/pages/activities/ContributionsPage.ts" "tests/intranet/activities and benefits/edit_contribution.spec.ts" --types node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution node 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40 })
Bash(echo "=== zip ready at: D:\\\\my playright project\\\\playwright-report.zip ===")

PowerShell(try { $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9323 -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "stopped report server \(pid $p\)" } catch { "no server on 9323 \(already stopped\)" })

PowerShell(try { $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9323 -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "stopped report server \(pid $p\)" } catch { "no server on 9323" })
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40; if \($?\) { "TSC OK" })

Bash(node -e "const now=new Date\(\); const q=Math.floor\(now.getMonth\(\)/3\)*3; console.log\('today=',now.toISOString\(\).slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('quarterStartMonth\(0-idx\)=',q\); console.log\('quarterStart=',new Date\(now.getFullYear\(\),q,1\).toISOString\(\).slice\(0,10\)\);")
PowerShell(npx playwright test "tests/intranet/activities and benefits/create_self_blog.spec.ts" --grep "happy flow" --project=chromium)
